productDisplayName: Lotto Men's Chamonix Brown Black Shoe
description: An excellent combination of superior technology and style, the lotto Chamonix is designed to keep your feet dry and comfortable during a rigourous training session. Slip into these trainers for a great workout or simply pair them with casual wear for an urban look.Upper Mesh upper with stitched synthetic overlays for extended durability and breathability Synthetic lace for snug Fit and durability Cushioned collar and padded tongue for enhanced comfort and snug fit Midsole EVA injected midsole for lightweight feel and high shock absorption Removable footbed for easy maintenance, extended durability and to fit an orthotic Padded sockliner for snug fit and comfort grip Outsole Carbon rubber outsole with multi directional pattern for enhanced grip on various terrains Dedicated rubber lugs and an extra patch of rubber around the periphery of the heel for superior traction Scoop below the heel counter for air-cushioned comfort Extended rubber outsole embedded onto the toe box for superior shock absorption Wash careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
